title: rubus inflexus
intro: Rubus inflexus, also known as the flexile dog rose or thimbleberry, is a species of rose native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus inflexus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Rubus inflexus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
